mapper.sql: id, code, name, phone, email, password_hash, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.code, u.name, u.phone, u.email, u.password_hash, u.status, u.last_login_at, u.created_at, u.updated_at, ur.role_code FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.code = ur.user_code WHERE u.code = #{code}

SELECT u.id, u.code, u.name, u.phone, u.email, u.password_hash, u.status, u.last_login_at, u.created_at, u.updated_at, ur.role_code FROM ( SELECT FROM sys_user
AND (code LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR phone LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR email LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND status = #{status}
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_role ur2 WHERE ur2.user_code = sys_user.code AND ur2.role_code = #{role})
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset} ) u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.code = ur.user_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (code, name, phone, email, password_hash, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt} WHERE code = #{code}
UPDATE sys_user SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE code = #{code}
